name: bandit.extortion_at_camp_standoff_mcw
description: Named Basecamp extortion restage: start from the honest claimed nearby-owned-site McWilliams/Basecamp footing, disable safe mode, advance through the real live owner/dispatch/local-contact path until the local gate reaches camp-adjacent stand-off pressure at a visible five-OMT hold-off distance, and stop there for probe capture or manual handoff.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams fixture; this is startup/load evidence only

steps.label: disable_safe_mode
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode off and gameplay still focused before time advancement

steps.label: advance_4500_turns_to_basecamp_standoff
steps.expected_visible_fact: local-gate hold_off result reached; debug artifact must show live_dispatch_goal=140,46,0

evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for standoff/return behavior
live_required_checkpoints: post load: normal McWilliams gameplay screen after fixture install
safe mode off: gameplay still focused after safe-mode toggle
after advancement: debug log contains local_gate hold_off and live_dispatch_goal at visible five-OMT standoff
evidence_contract.failure_rule: If the run only reaches startup/gameplay screens, hangs during advancement, or lacks local_gate/dispatch artifacts, it is not standoff proof.
